'''shamopo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:chabasite|chabasite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-m-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chabasite|chabasite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| shamopo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shæmepeth|shæmepeth]] || [[word:shæmepej|shæmepej]] || [[word:shæmepesh|shæmepesh]] || [[word:shæmepe|shæmepe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shamomopoth|shamomopoth]] || [[word:shamomopoj|shamomopoj]] || [[word:shamomoposh|shamomoposh]] || [[word:shamomopo|shamomopo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shamopoth|shamopoth]] || [[word:shamopoj|shamopoj]] || [[word:shamoposh|shamoposh]] || [[word:shamopo|shamopo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shamofpoth|shamofpoth]] || [[word:shamofpoj|shamofpoj]] || [[word:shamofposh|shamofposh]] || [[word:shamofpof|shamofpof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shamopotho|shamopotho]] || [[word:shamopojo|shamopojo]] || [[word:shamoposho|shamoposho]] || [[word:shamopoko|shamopoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shamopoth|shamopoth]] || [[word:shamopoj|shamopoj]] || [[word:shamoposh|shamoposh]] || [[word:shamopo|shamopo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shamopothol|shamopothol]] || [[word:shamopojol|shamopojol]] || [[word:shamoposhol|shamoposhol]] || [[word:shamopokol|shamopokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shamopothotho|shamopothotho]] || [[word:shamopojojo|shamopojojo]] || [[word:shamoposhosho|shamoposhosho]] || [[word:shamopoko|shamopoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shamopothon|shamopothon]] || [[word:shamopojon|shamopojon]] || [[word:shamoposhon|shamoposhon]] || [[word:shamopokon|shamopokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shamopothoro|shamopothoro]] || [[word:shamopojoro|shamopojoro]] || [[word:shamoposhoro|shamoposhoro]] || [[word:shamopokoro|shamopokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
